popularStory.headline: Biography of Katherine Knowsley 1247 - after 1325.
popularStory.description: She survived Robert and married, secondly, Sir John de Denum, who, however, did not live long. Katherine, as widow of Sir Robert de Lathom, continued to hold a share of his estates for many years; see …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Knowsley於1247年5月7日出生在英國藍卡爾可諾福斯利時，她的父親Thomas de Knowsley22歲，母親Jane verch Gronwy Tudor26歲。她於1261年之前與Sir Robert de Lathom II在英國爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1325年之後在英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Knowsley于1247年5月7日出生在英国藍卡爾可諾福斯利时，她的父亲Thomas de Knowsley22岁，母亲Jane verch Gronwy Tudor26岁。她于1261年之前与Sir Robert de Lathom II在英国爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1325年之后在英国藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可。

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Knowsley was born on 7 May 1247, in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, her father, Thomas de Knowsley, was 22 and her mother, Jane verch Gronwy Tudor, was 26. She married Sir Robert de Lathom II before 1261, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died after 1325, in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Knowsley est née le 7 mai 1247, à Knowsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Knowsley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Jane verch Gronwy Tudor, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Lathom II avant 1261, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée après 1325, à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Knowsley am 7. Mai 1247 in Knowsley, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Knowsley 22 und ihre Mutter Jane verch Gronwy Tudor 26. Sie hat vor 1261 in Cheshire, England Sir Robert de Lathom II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1325 in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Knowsley è nata il il 7 maggio 1247 nel Knowsley, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Knowsley, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Jane verch Gronwy Tudor, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert de Lathom II prima del 1261, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì dopo il 1325, nel Ormskirk, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Knowsleyが1247年5月7日にイギリスランカシュアイアノウスリーで生まれた時，父Thomas de Knowsleyは22歳，母Jane verch Gronwy Tudorは26歳であった。1261年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアでSir Robert de Lathom IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1325年以後にイギリスランカシュアイアオルムスキルクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Knowsley(이)가 1247년 5월 7일 영국 랭카실르 노우슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Knowsley(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane verch Gronwy Tudor(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1261년 이전 영국 체실르에서 Sir Robert de Lathom II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1325년 이후 영국 랭카실르 오스커크에서 사망했다.

mn.Lathom, Ormskirk, West Lancashire, Lanca: Lathom, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Knowsley nasceu em 7 de maio de 1247, em Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Knowsley, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Jane verch Gronwy Tudor, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Lathom II antes 1261, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1325, em Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Knowsley родилась 7 мая 1247 г. в местности ноусли, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Knowsley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Jane verch Gronwy Tudor, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Lathom II перед 1261 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла после 1325 г. в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Knowsley nació el 7 de mayo de 1247, en Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Knowsley, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Jane verch Gronwy Tudor, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Robert de Lathom II antes de 1261, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió después de 1325, en Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
